name: generate_scene
description: Generates a top-down 2D map in Map Format D: a terrain grid (ASCII strings) plus a list of named entities with cell + footprint. The narrative engine reads it to know what is where; the game engine renders it. See system prompt for the full schema and a worked example.

terrain_patches.description: Optional ASCII detail stamps over the biome fill (tiles only).

place_anchors.description: World-map places physically living in this tile (tiles only).

place_id.description: Optional. The world-map place id this scene realizes; the engine binds the scene to that place.

scene_description.description: 2-3 sentence description of the scene, in Spanish.

meters_per_cell.description: 0.5 for interiors (furniture-scale), 2 for outdoor scenes. See system prompt.

terrain.description: Exactly `rows` strings, each EXACTLY `cols` characters wide. Each char is a terrain glyph (g=grass, w=water, _=path, s=stone, b=bridge, d=dirt, a=sand, o=wood, or any char you define in terrain_legend).

terrain_legend.description: Mapping from terrain char to terrain name. Reserved chars don't need to appear here. Add any custom terrain chars you used. A value can also be {"name": ..., "solid": true|false} to declare that char blocks movement (walls, water). W and w are solid by default; b (bridge) is walkable.

terrain_features.description: Optional. Smooth vector shapes painted over the grid: thick polylines (meandering river, curving road) or filled polygons (closed=true). points are [col,row] cell coords (floats allowed), width in cells. Array order = paint order (river first, bridge after).

type.description: river|water|path|road|bridge|stone|paved|dirt|sand|wood|grass or a free Spanish name resolved by keywords.

width.description: Stroke width in cells (default 1). Ignored for closed polygons.

at_edges.description: Tile seams: exact border cells this feature enters/exits at.

terrain_svg.description: Optional, rarely needed. SVG of pure shapes over the terrain: viewBox EXACTLY "0 0 <cols> <rows>" (cell units), max 20KB, no script/foreignObject/href. Use only when grid + terrain_features cannot express the shape.

map_ground.description: Tiles only, strongly recommended. Ground-plane SVG of the tile (FLAT art only): viewBox EXACTLY "0 0 128 128", max 32KB, shape elements only, with the layers <g id="ground">, <g id="water"> and optional <g id="deck"> (walkable over water). Anything with height goes in `volumes` instead.

volumes.description: Tiles only, strongly recommended. Everything with HEIGHT as typed objects (building/wall/tower/gate/tree/bush/rock/fountain/prop) with footprint in cells + height; the engine projects them to the session perspective and derives collision from the footprints. See the MAP PLAN section of the system prompt.

structures.description: Enterable rooms/buildings stamped deterministically by the engine: closed wall perimeter + floor + door gaps. NEVER hand-draw W borders when a structure can do it. rect = [col,row,w,h] outer rectangle (walls included, min 3x3); doors carve walkable gaps.

wall_char.description: Terrain char for the walls (default W, always solid).

floor_char.description: Terrain char for the interior floor (default o).

doors.description: 1+ door gaps or the room is sealed.

at.description: Cells from the rect's top/left corner along that side (1..side-2; corners cannot be doors).

vegetation_zones.description: Deterministic tree scatter (seeded by scene_id) over walkable cells of the area, skipping rooms, doors and occupied cells. Use instead of hand-placing many trees; hand-placed trees remain fine for landmarks.

type.description: Plant name in Spanish (pino, roble, matorral).

area.description: [col, row, width_cells, height_cells], or "rest" (tiles only: everything still bare biome).

density.description: Fraction of cells planted: 0.05 sparse, 0.25 thick.

entities.description: Every thing on the map that is NOT terrain.

cell.description: [col, row] of the top-left of the footprint.

glyph.description: A single printable ASCII char, distinct from terrain chars.

shape.description: Optional footprint shape hint (default box). cylinder = round (barrel/well/round tower/urn/fountain), sphere = boulder/dome, cone = tent/spire/pile, box = buildings/walls/crates.

h.description: Optional real-world height in METRES (NOT cells — footprint stays in cells). Guide: house 2.5-4, tower/church 5-8, tree 3-8, prop 0.5-2, item/decor ~0.5. Omit to use the per-kind default (building 2.5, tree 4, prop 1, item/decor 0.5).

texture_hash.description: Optional. Reuse a cached texture by 16-char hash from available_assets.

model_hash.description: Optional. Reuse a cached 3D model by hash.

attach.description: decor only: snap to the nearest wall cell (torches, signs, banners).

ambient_event.description: One Spanish sentence of atmospheric flavour (wind, birdsong, smell of stew, etc.).
